title: Parkside Commons and Flock ALPR Cameras -- Both Items Held
summary: Councilor Monto reports items 31 and 32 continue to be held. Item 31 (Parkside Commons shelter rent): Assessment Commissioner OJ and Councilor Williams meeting Friday, may be ready for Monday vote. Staff emphasizes shelter rent request is consistent with and at ceiling of standard practice. Item 32 (Flock Group ALPR cameras revocation): held without discussion.
raw_content:
